summary: P7 frontend UI implementation and deployable dist are now present. The frontend is no longer only a typed contract/PageModel layer. Full-project acceptance still cannot be marked pass until TEST-006 runs the backend jar plus frontend dist combination and records a browser-triggered real backend API call.

issues.problem: Frontend dist and browser smoke are complete, but the combined backend jar + frontend dist E2E has not yet been executed.
issues.impact: The project has a deployable frontend artifact, but it is not yet proven as a complete user-facing system in a combined environment.
issues.requiredAction: Start backend and frontend production artifacts together, then record browser login/navigation and at least one real backend API call in docs/test_runs/frontend-backend-combo-e2e.md.

deferredRisks.reason: Create-system idempotency still uses single-JVM memory storage. Current smoke covers same-process conflict, but production multi-instance consistency needs shared storage or a database idempotency table.
npm ci reports 2 moderate audit items. No npm audit fix --force was applied because it may force dependency upgrades; schedule dependency governance after P7 combination validation.

verification: frontend/src/App.ts implements the root UI and route workspaces
npm.cmd run build passed and generated frontend/dist
Chrome headless desktop and mobile screenshots generated under frontend/docs/
